skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem: Three times the sum of a number p and 5 is equal to a number q. The number q is 4 more than the number p. Which system of equations describes this situation?
rationale: Three times the sum of p and 5 is 3(p + 5), which equals q. Saying q is 4 more than p translates to q = p + 4. Choice C matches both. The correct answer is choice C.
